title: Garden Fresh Thai Daikon Moo Ping
description: Savory, crumbly, and flavorful Thai dish featuring daikon, inspired by Bangkok street food. Serve with steamed jasmine rice and fresh herbs for a delicious pescatarian meal.
instructions: Peel and grate the daikon radish, and set aside.
In a bowl, combine cilantro, ginger, lemongrass, chili peppers, fish sauce, palm sugar, and curry paste. Mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and coconut milk together.
Add the egg mixture to the cilantro mixture and mix until well combined.
Add the grated daikon radish to the mixture and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 4-6 patties, depending on the desired size.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned and the center is cooked through.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
